title: Sous Chef ( Central Kitchen / Hot Food Department / East Area )
description:
Job Description:

The Sous Chef will oversee daily hot food kitchen operations, ensuring consistent food quality, productivity, food safety, and team performance. This role requires strong leadership, hands-on cooking expertise, and the ability to manage kitchen staff, workflows, and standards in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and oversee daily hot food kitchen operations to ensure consistent quality, taste, and presentation in accordance with approved recipes and standards
  • Supervise, guide, and motivate kitchen staff, ensuring proper task allocation, discipline, and high performance during daily operations
  • Actively participate in hands-on cooking and production, especially during peak periods, to support operational efficiency
  • Enforce strict compliance with food hygiene, safety, and sanitation standards in line with SFA and company requirements
  • Monitor food preparation processes, portion control, and cooking methods to minimize wastage and control food costs
  • Conduct daily checks on ingredient freshness, storage conditions, temperature control, and expiry dates
  • Support inventory management including stock ordering, stock rotation (FIFO), and reporting of discrepancies or shortages
  • Train and coach junior chefs and kitchen assistants to improve technical skills, productivity, and adherence to SOPs
  • Assist in maintaining a clean, organized, and efficient kitchen environment while supporting audits, inspections, and continuous improvement initiatives

Qualities:

  • At least 3-5 years of relevant working experience
  • Expertise in cooking Nonya cuisine not necessary but an added advantage
  • Possess passion and interest in new recipes and products
  • A team player who works efficiently to fulfil the production demands
  • Willing to keep learning to broaden knowledge and harness new methods of production

Interested applicants, you may either apply via here or sent an email at hr@harrianns.com.

At present, we do not require assistance from recruitment agencies. All applications should be submitted directly by candidates.

postedCompany.description:
HarriAnns is a Singapore-grown eatery with humble beginnings dating back to more than 60 years. It originated as a simple push-cart in the Tiong Bahru district in the early 1950s.

HarriAnns offers Peranakan heritage food made following recipes passed down for three generations from Grandma’s time. Till today, HarriAnns insists on using traditional methods and the freshest premium ingredients in the making of our Nonya Kueh. Each piece of Kueh is an edible piece of art, hand-crafted painstakingly by their chefs with tender loving care.

Through the decades, HarriAnns has become a name synonymous with good heritage food throughout Singapore. HarriAnns’ edible national treasures will change the way you think about Tradition and put Singapore heritage food on the culinary map of the world.
postedCompany.name: HARRIANN'S PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
